patterns.name: Prefix Sum
patterns.description: Many range-sum / subarray-sum queries or count-of-subarrays problems.
patterns.whenToUse: Many range-sum / subarray-sum queries or count-of-subarrays problems.

patterns.name: Kadane Algorithm
patterns.whenToUse: Maximum/minimum contiguous subarray value.
mistakes: resetting to 0 instead of current element

patterns.name: Two Pointer
patterns.description: Sorted arrays/strings or pairing problems where two indices move to shrink the search.
patterns.whenToUse: Sorted arrays/strings or pairing problems where two indices move to shrink the search.
mistakes: moving both pointers when only one should

patterns.name: Same Direction
patterns.description: Same Direction — a Two Pointer pattern.

patterns.name: Opposite Direction
patterns.description: Opposite Direction — a Two Pointer pattern.

patterns.name: Fast Slow Pointer
patterns.description: Cycle detection and finding middle of a sequence/linked list.
patterns.whenToUse: Cycle detection and finding middle of a sequence/linked list.
mistakes: wrong start offset for cycle entry

patterns.name: Dutch National Flag
patterns.description: Dutch National Flag — a Two Pointer pattern.

patterns.name: Fixed Window
patterns.description: Aggregate over every window of a fixed size k.
patterns.whenToUse: Aggregate over every window of a fixed size k.

patterns.name: Variable Window
patterns.whenToUse: Longest/shortest window satisfying a constraint.

patterns.description: Frequency Window — a Sliding Window pattern.

patterns.description: Character Window — a Sliding Window pattern.

patterns.name: Substring Window
patterns.description: Substring Window — a Sliding Window pattern.

patterns.name: Binary Search
patterns.description: Sorted data or any monotonic predicate.
patterns.whenToUse: Sorted data or any monotonic predicate.

patterns.name: Binary Search on Answer
patterns.description: Minimize/maximize a value where feasibility is monotonic.
patterns.whenToUse: Minimize/maximize a value where feasibility is monotonic.

patterns.description: Search Space Reduction — a Binary Search pattern.

patterns.name: HashMap
patterns.description: O(1) lookups: complements, seen-sets, grouping, counting.
patterns.whenToUse: O(1) lookups: complements, seen-sets, grouping, counting.

patterns.name: Frequency Count
patterns.description: Anagrams, top-k, majority — anything counting occurrences.
patterns.whenToUse: Anagrams, top-k, majority — anything counting occurrences.

patterns.name: Monotonic Stack
patterns.description: Next/previous greater or smaller element; histogram-style spans.
patterns.whenToUse: Next/previous greater or smaller element; histogram-style spans.

patterns.name: Next Greater Element
patterns.description: For each element, the next element bigger than it.

patterns.description: Reverse List — a Linked List pattern.

patterns.description: Merge List — a Linked List pattern.

patterns.description: Fast Slow List — a Linked List pattern.

patterns.description: Cycle Detection — a Linked List pattern.

patterns.name: Dummy Node
patterns.description: Dummy Node — a Linked List pattern.

patterns.name: Tree Traversal
patterns.whenToUse: Any binary-tree problem — inorder/preorder/postorder/level.

patterns.name: BST
patterns.description: Ordered operations: search/insert/kth/validate on a BST.
patterns.whenToUse: Ordered operations: search/insert/kth/validate on a BST.

patterns.name: LCA
patterns.description: Lowest common ancestor of two tree/graph nodes.

patterns.name: Trie
patterns.description: Prefix queries over a dictionary of strings.
patterns.whenToUse: Prefix queries over a dictionary of strings.

patterns.name: Top K
patterns.description: K largest/smallest/most-frequent from a stream or array.
patterns.whenToUse: K largest/smallest/most-frequent from a stream or array.

patterns.whenToUse: Merge multiple sorted sequences.

patterns.name: Priority Queue Heap
patterns.description: Priority Queue Heap — a Heap pattern.

patterns.name: Graph DFS
patterns.whenToUse: Connectivity, components, cycles, path enumeration.

patterns.name: Graph BFS
patterns.description: Shortest path in unweighted graphs / level expansion.
patterns.whenToUse: Shortest path in unweighted graphs / level expansion.

patterns.name: Topological Sort
patterns.description: Ordering with dependencies in a DAG.
patterns.whenToUse: Ordering with dependencies in a DAG.

patterns.name: Union Find
patterns.description: Dynamic connectivity, grouping, cycle detection in undirected graphs.
patterns.whenToUse: Dynamic connectivity, grouping, cycle detection in undirected graphs.

patterns.name: Dijkstra
patterns.whenToUse: Shortest path with non-negative weights.

patterns.whenToUse: Paths/cost over a matrix.

patterns.whenToUse: Longest increasing subsequence and variants.

patterns.name: LCS
patterns.whenToUse: Alignment/edit between two sequences.

patterns.name: Knapsack
patterns.description: Choose items under a capacity/target constraint.
